rationale.R1.3: The agent identified a critical evidence-claim mismatch, auditing every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims but did not mark confidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified harmful patterns and prevented regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not consistently annotated.
